summary: First end-to-end test pass for VolunCore. Backend: 30/30 pytest cases pass (auth/dev-login, user/role, volunteer profile+stats, NGO upsert+admin approval, causes with Gemini ai_summary, enrollments+hours, Gemini matches, field reports with AI analysis (urgency/sentiment/summary/is_crisis nested in ai_analysis + top-level is_crisis), Auri multi-turn chat with same session_id, admin overview, leaderboard, and 401/403 enforcement on protected endpoints). All Gemini calls via emergentintegrations work. Frontend: Landing renders hero+stats+CTAs, /auth signs in via Firebase web SDK after dev-login provisions the user, /v volunteer dashboard renders with full sidebar (Dashboard/Discover/AI Matches/My Causes/Field Reports/Auri AI/Impact/Leaderboard/Profile) and 'Welcome back' toast, /admin overview renders 4 KPI tiles (Volunteers 5, NGOs Approved 3, Causes Open 3, Crisis Reports 3), Causes-by-category bar, Recent crises feed, and quick links; /admin/ngos renders Pending/Approved/All filter tabs. Toast (sonner) works. No JSX parse errors observed; no PAGEERRORs in console.

minor.issue: Pydantic EmailStr rejects @voluncore.test (reserved TLD) — the seeded credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md cannot actually be used. Tests had to switch to @voluncore.app domain. Recommend updating test_credentials.md to use voluncore.app, or relax the email validator.

integration_issues.issue: Could not locate a Send button reliably (no data-testid on chat send button or message textarea). The Auri chat backend works (test_auri_chat_multi_turn passed) but the UI flow could not be auto-clicked. Add data-testid='auri-chat-input' and data-testid='auri-chat-send' so tests can drive multi-turn chat from the browser.

action_items: Add data-testid attributes to interactive elements: auth email/password/sign-in (auth-email, auth-password, auth-signin), role buttons (role-volunteer, role-ngo), volunteer dashboard 'Setup my profile' CTA, sidebar links (nav-dashboard, nav-discover, nav-matches, nav-mycauses, nav-reports, nav-chat, nav-impact, nav-leaderboard, nav-profile, nav-signout), admin nav and KPI tiles, NGO approve/reject buttons, Auri chat input + send button, cause create form fields. This will unblock browser-driven test automation.

Update /app/memory/test_credentials.md to use @voluncore.app for volunteer and ngo (Pydantic v2 email-validator forbids the reserved .test TLD; current seeded credentials raise 422 on /api/auth/dev-login).
(Optional) Add data-testid to NGO register form so the /ngo/register → /ngo/pending → /ngo dashboard flow can be auto-driven.
critical_code_review_comments: Schema field naming is consistent and correct: VolunteerProfileIn uses full_name (not name), NgoProfileIn uses org_name + focus_areas + contact_email + country, CauseIn uses location_city/location_country (not 'location'), HoursIn uses int hours + note (not float + cause_id). Spec language in the review request used different keys — recommend updating product spec / OpenAPI examples to match.

FieldReportOut nests AI fields under body.ai_analysis (urgency/sentiment/summary/needs/is_crisis/category/action_recommendation) AND surfaces is_crisis at the top level. Spec said 'urgency, sentiment, summary, is_crisis populated' — current shape matches semantically; just document that the urgency/sentiment/summary keys live under ai_analysis.
ADMIN_EMAILS check is exact-match (not domain), so creating a *@voluncore.app non-admin user does not auto-promote — verified.
Auri chat works in multi-turn mode with the same session_id (memory persisted in Firestore-backed LlmChat), confirmed via test_auri_chat_multi_turn.
Gemini cause summarization is fast (~1-2s) and returns a non-empty ai_summary on cause create; matches endpoint also returns scored items with 'reason' text.
/api/admin/ngos/{id}/approve {approve:true} flips is_approved=true and persists — confirmed via subsequent GET /ngo/me.

success_rate.frontend: 90% — landing, auth, role-routed volunteer dashboard, admin overview, admin/ngos all render & load data; only the Auri chat send-message UI flow could not be auto-driven due to missing data-testids (backend chat passes)

test_credentials: admin@voluncore.app / Admin@12345 (Firebase, auto-promoted via ADMIN_EMAILS). volunteer@voluncore.app / Volunteer@12345 (provisioned via dev-login during this run, role=volunteer, profile seeded). ngo@voluncore.app / Ngo@12345 (provisioned during this run, role=ngo). The original .test-domain credentials in /app/memory/test_credentials.md DO NOT WORK because Pydantic email-validator blocks the reserved .test TLD.
seed_data_creation: Per-run unique users vol_<RUN_ID>@voluncore.app and ngo_<RUN_ID>@voluncore.app, plus one TEST NGO + one approved NGO + one open environment cause + one enrollment with 3 hours logged + one critical-flood field report. All visible in admin overview (Volunteers=5, NGOs Approved=3, Causes Open=3, Crisis Reports=3).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py is the canonical regression suite; run `cd /app && python -m pytest backend/tests/backend_test.py -v --tb=short`. It self-provisions Firebase users via /api/auth/dev-login (gated by ENABLE_DEV_AUTH=true). For UI testing, sign-in via /auth using the .app accounts above; email/password works and routes to /v|/ngo|/admin per role automatically. /v/chat needs data-testids before deeper UI coverage.
rca of the issue: All red flags from the bulk-generated app are accounted for: (1) JSX parse bug in Dashboard.jsx was already fixed pre-test. (2) The dev-login auth helper works end-to-end and Firebase Identity Toolkit accepts the FIREBASE_WEB_API_KEY in backend/.env. (3) Gemini calls succeed on cause-summary, matches, report-analysis, and chat — confirming emergentintegrations + GEMINI_API_KEY are wired correctly. (4) The only seam is the documented credentials using a Pydantic-blocked TLD; switch to .app and everything passes.
